creator: kent@erix.ericsson.se
text:
This is a port of a Swedish dictionary to ispell. I saw
        there where ports for other languages so why not do
        one for swedish as well. The dictionary was found at the page

            http://www.sslug.dk/locale/ispell/iswedish/swedish.html

        I have tested the port according to the handbook, including
        portlint, but I'm sure I confused port version number with
        distribution source version number ;-)
